    Class PunctualLight

    A directional, point, or spot light.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class PunctualLight : LogicalChildOfRoot, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<GlbData>

    Properties

    Name Description
    Color

    Gets or sets the RGB value for light's color in linear space.
    InnerConeAngle

    Gets the Angle, in radians, from centre of spotlight where falloff begins. Must be greater than or equal to 0 and less than outerConeAngle.
    Intensity

    Gets or sets the Brightness of light in. The units that this is defined in depend on the type of light. point and spot lights use luminous intensity in candela (lm/sr) while directional lights use illuminance in lux (lm/m2)
    LightType

    Gets the type of light.
    LocalDirection

    Gets the Local light direction.
    OuterConeAngle

    Gets Angle, in radians, from centre of spotlight where falloff ends. Must be greater than innerConeAngle and less than or equal to PI / 2.0.
    Range

    Gets or sets a Hint defining a distance cutoff at which the light's intensity may be considered to have reached zero. Supported only for point and spot lights. When undefined, range is assumed to be infinite.

    Methods

    Name Description
    DeserializeProperty(string, ref Utf8JsonReader)

    Reads the properties of the current instance from a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader.
    GetLogicalChildren()

    Gets a collection of ExtraProperties instances stored by this object.

    OnValidateReferences(ValidationContext)
    SerializeProperties(Utf8JsonWriter)

    Writes the properties of the current instance to a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter.
    SetColor(Vector3, float, float)

    Defines the light color, intensity and range for the current PunctualLight.
    SetSpotCone(float, float)

    Sets the cone angles for the Spot light.
